name: Holley's Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend together graham cracker crumbs, 4 tablespoons sugar, and melted butter. Line the bottom of a prepared springform pan with this mixture.
2. Beat cream cheese until smooth. Add eggs one at a time, then add half of the sour cream, 1 cup sugar, and vanilla. Pour batter over the crust.
3. Bake for 1 hour at 300°F. Allow to stand.
4. For the hot fudge sauce, blend together 1 pint sour cream, 4 tablespoons sugar, and vanilla. Pour over the cooled cake.
5. Bake for 5 minutes at 300°F. Cool completely before refrigerating.
6. To make the hot fudge sauce, melt butter in a saucepan. Remove from heat, then add cocoa, chopped chocolate, evaporated milk, and vanilla. Stir until smooth, bring to a boil, and simmer briefly. Add Grand Marnier and mix well. Let cool slightly before pouring over the cake just before serving.
7. Store any leftover hot fudge sauce in an airtight container in the refrigerator.
